howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: From Base experience to certified professional. Faster than you can imagine.

step1.title: Register
step1.description: Sign up and tell us about your background and goals. We'll match you with the right training path.

step2.title: Learn Skills
step2.description: Participate in high-intensity, on-site learning in Portuguese or English. From safety fundamentals to specialized techniques.

step3.title: Train On-Site
step3.description: Weekend hands-on training (Fri-Sun) with real tools and experienced professionals.

step4.title: CERTIFIED
step4.description: Earn your RB1 Certificate after 1-4 weekends of training. Your first milestone to a professional career!

step5.title: GET YOUR VEHICLE
step5.description: Get your fully equipped vehicle to start working as a professional builder.

seo.title: Frequently Asked Questions
seo.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about Real Builder, the premier construction academy in Portugal. Learn about our courses, certification, and job placement.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Real Builder academy, our courses, and your future career in construction.

items.question: What is Real Builder?
items.answer: <brand /> is a premier construction academy in Portugal dedicated to transforming individuals with basic or no experience into certified, job-ready construction professionals. We focus on intensive, hands-on training to meet the high demand of the modern construction industry.
items.answerText: Real Builder is a premier construction academy in Portugal dedicated to transforming individuals with basic or no experience into certified, job-ready construction professionals. We focus on intensive, hands-on training to meet the high demand of the modern construction industry.

items.question: How does the certification process work?
items.answer: Our certification process is divided into levels (RB1, RB2, RB3). You start with foundational safety and basic skills, progressing to specialized techniques in areas like plumbing, electrical work, carpentry, and masonry. Each level requires passing rigorous practical exams.
items.answerText: Our certification process is divided into levels (RB1, RB2, RB3). You start with foundational safety and basic skills, progressing to specialized techniques in areas like plumbing, electrical work, carpentry, and masonry. Each level requires passing rigorous practical exams.

items.question: Do I need prior construction experience to join?
items.answer: No prior experience is required for our foundational RB1 courses. We welcome anyone with the right mindset, physical readiness, and willingness to learn. We provide all the necessary tools and knowledge from day one.
items.answerText: No prior experience is required for our foundational RB1 courses. We welcome anyone with the right mindset, physical readiness, and willingness to learn. We provide all the necessary tools and knowledge from day one.

items.question: What is the job placement rate after graduation?
items.answer: We are proud of our 93% job placement rate. Thanks to our strong partnerships with leading construction companies across Portugal, our certified <brandNoAcademy />s have direct pathways to high-paying, stable employment immediately after graduation.
items.answerText: We are proud of our 93% job placement rate. Thanks to our strong partnerships with leading construction companies across Portugal, our certified Real Builders have direct pathways to high-paying, stable employment immediately after graduation.

items.question: Are the courses taught in English or Portuguese?
items.answer: To accommodate a diverse range of students, including locals and expatriates, our high-intensity, on-site learning programs are available in both Portuguese and English.
items.answerText: To accommodate a diverse range of students, including locals and expatriates, our high-intensity, on-site learning programs are available in both Portuguese and English.

items.question: How long does it take to get certified?
items.answer: The initial RB1 certification (Getting Started) typically takes between 1 to 4 weekends, depending on the specific course track. Advanced certifications (RB2 and RB3) require additional specialized training modules.
items.answerText: The initial RB1 certification (Getting Started) typically takes between 1 to 4 weekends, depending on the specific course track. Advanced certifications (RB2 and RB3) require additional specialized training modules.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.p1: Welcome to <brand />. These Terms and Conditions govern the access and use of our website and the services provided by <brand />, headquartered at Avenida Mateus Teixeira Azevedo 55, Tavira, Portugal.
intro.p2: By accessing and using this website, the user agrees to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our website.

services.title: Services
services.p1: <brand /> offers professional training courses in the construction industry, including, but not limited to, drywall installation, tiling, and underfloor heating installation.
services.p2: Enrollment in courses is subject to availability, meeting admission requirements, and payment of the respective tuition fees, where applicable.

payments.title: Enrollments and Payments
payments.p1: By submitting an enrollment form, the user guarantees that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.
payments.p2: Specific payment conditions, cancellation, and refund policies will be communicated to the user at the time of formalizing the enrollment in the respective course.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.p1: All content present on this website, including texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, is the property of <brand /> or its content suppliers and is protected by Portuguese and international copyright laws.
intellectual.p2: The reproduction, duplication, copying, selling, reselling, or exploitation of any part of the website for commercial purposes without our express written consent is not permitted.

data.title: Data Protection
data.p1: The collection and processing of personal data are carried out in accordance with our Privacy Policy, in strict compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable legislation.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: <brand /> makes every effort to ensure that the information presented on the website is accurate and up-to-date. However, we do not guarantee the absence of errors or omissions.
liability.p2: <brand /> shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this website or the services offered.

changes.title: Changes to the Terms
changes.p1: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms and Conditions at any time, without prior notice. Continued use of the website following any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms and Conditions.

law.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
law.p1: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with Portuguese law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from the interpretation or execution of these Terms, the jurisdiction of the district of Faro is competent, with express waiver of any other.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.p1: For any questions related to these Terms and Conditions, please contact us via:

intro.title: Introduction
intro.p1: <brand /> respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information when you visit our website or use our services, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - Regulation (EU) 2016/679).

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.p1: The entity responsible for processing your personal data is <brand />, headquartered at Avenida Mateus Teixeira Azevedo 55, Tavira, Portugal.

dataCollect.title: Data We Collect
dataCollect.p1: We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:

contact.label: Contact Data
contact.value: Email address, phone number, city, district.

professional.label: Professional and Academic Data
professional.value: Education level, language skills, digital skills, experience in the construction industry, resume, and certificates (when submitted).

navigation.label: Navigation Data
navigation.value: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on our website (through cookies).

purposes.title: Purposes and Legal Basis
purposes.p1: We use your personal data for the following purposes:

enrollment.label: Enrollment Management
enrollment.value: To process your application for our courses and assess your eligibility. (Legal basis: Performance of a contract or pre-contractual steps).

communication.label: Communication
communication.value: To respond to information requests, send course updates, and notify you of open enrollments. (Legal basis: Consent or legitimate interest).

improvement.label: Service Improvement
improvement.value: To analyze website usage and improve user experience. (Legal basis: Legitimate interest).

legal.label: Legal Compliance
legal.value: To comply with legal obligations to which we are subject. (Legal basis: Legal obligation).

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.p1: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. We may only share your data with:

items.providers: Service providers acting on our behalf (e.g., web hosting services, form management platforms like Formspree).
items.authorities: Competent authorities, when required by law.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.p1: We retain your personal data only for the period strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or to comply with legal, tax, or regulatory obligations.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.p1: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:

items.access: Request access to your personal data.
items.rectification: Request the rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data.
items.erasure: Request the erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten").
items.object: Object to the processing of your data.
items.withdraw: Withdraw consent at any time (without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal).

rights.p2: To exercise these rights, please contact us by phone at +351 939 996 924. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the National Data Protection Commission (CNPD) in Portugal.

security.title: Security
security.p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized destruction, loss, alteration, disclosure, or access.

changes.title: Changes to this Policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We recommend that you review this page regularly to stay informed about how we protect your data.
